name: PT Provident Agro Tbk
summary: PT Provident Agro Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the operation of palm oil plantations in Indonesia. It develops plantation through land processing, seeding, nursery, planting, maintenance, and harvesting of fresh fruit bunch; processes fresh fruit bunch into crude palm oil and palm kernel; and sells and trades in plantation products. The company operates a total planted area of approximately 6.295 hectares. It also engages in the trading activities. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
